data.title: Trend Research may hold 64.25% of the total NEIRO tokens
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Ember's monitoring, Trend Research holds 64.25% of the total amount of Meme coin NEIRO through 13 associated addresses, currently worth about 55.69 million US dollars. These NEIRO were mainly withdrawn from Bybit and Gate from late March to late May. During this period, the price of NEIRO increased by 6 times, which may be caused by its pull.

data.title: SEI gains 15.6% after selection for American stablecoin pilot
data.description:

The price rally brought SEI to over $0. 21, up from intraday lows of around $0. 182 earlier in the […]

data.title: $8,000 Disappears From a Couple’s Wells Fargo Account After Scammers Pose As the Bank’s Fraud Representatives: Report
data.description:
Scammers posing as Wells Fargo’s fraud representatives reportedly stole thousands of dollars from a Texas couple’s bank account. Joan Leon, of Kingwood, Texas, says she received a call that looked like it was coming from her local Wells Fargo branch, making her trust the caller, reports Fox26 Houston.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/06/20/8000-disappears-from-a-couples-wells-fargo-account-after-scammers-pose-as-the-banks-fraud-representatives-report/

data.title: Kindly MD's Stock Declines Amid Bitcoin Treasury Plans
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, the stock of healthcare data company Kindly MD, listed on the U.S. stock market, fell by 4.23%, bringing its market capitalization down to $111 million. 

This decline follows Kindly MD, Inc.'s announcement of completing an additional $51.5 million in private investment in public equity (PIPE) financing. The funds are intended to support the company's efforts to establish a Bitcoin treasury. Kindly MD has also announced plans to merge with Bitcoin-native holding company Nakamoto Holdings Inc.

data.title: Bitcoin Supply Cluster Indicates Key Threshold for Market Trends
data.description:
According to Foresight News, data analysis platform Glassnode has updated its Bitcoin supply cluster heatmap, revealing a significant supply cluster located in the $95,500 to $97,000 range. This area is slightly below the short-term holder cost basis of $98,000.

This convergence zone represents a crucial threshold for Bitcoin's market trends. Maintaining prices above this level is favorable for the continuation of a bull market, while a drop below could potentially trigger a mid-term bearish phase.

data.title: Stackup, a crypto platform founded by former SpaceX executives, completes $4.2 million seed round, led by 1kx
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Stackup, a crypto platform founded by former SpaceX mission manager John Rising, has completed a $4.2 million seed round of financing, led by 1kx, with participation from three other companies including Y Combinator and Digital Currency Group. The platform provides enterprises with a "centralized control of decentralized assets" solution through account abstraction technology, supporting functions such as spending limits and batch transaction audits.
Rising emphasized the importance of system security design with his experience in aerospace engineering, pointing out that the current crypto field is overly focused on security protection and neglects operational security. The Stackup team currently consists of 4 people, and its technology has previously been used in wallet development for Coinbase and Trust Wallet. (Decrypt)

data.title: SRM Entertainment's Stock Surges Amid Tron Merger Plans
data.description: According to BlockBeats, SRM Entertainment, a publicly traded company on the U.S. stock market, saw its stock price increase by 44.63%, raising its market capitalization to $195 million. This surge follows the announcement that Tron plans to go public through a reverse merger with SRM Entertainment. Tron is expected to inject up to $210 million in token assets into the newly formed company. Currently, Tron's total market capitalization stands at $26.066 billion.
